title: rubus hebes
intro: Rubus hebes, also known as Hebe, is a flowering plant native to New Zealand, belonging to the heath family (Ericaceae). The medicinal properties of Rubus hebes lie in its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and infections. The health benefits of Hebe include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and provide antioxidant properties to protect against cell damage. Hebe can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health concerns.
